name: MuseDock Shop
description: E-commerce module for MuseDock CMS. Stripe payments, cart, checkout, subscriptions, invoices. Available for any tenant.
author: Screen Art S.L.U.

changes: Initial implementation: module structure, bootstrap, routes, translations (es/en)
7 database tables: shop_products, shop_customers, shop_orders, shop_order_items, shop_subscriptions, shop_coupons, shop_invoices
7 models with query builder, relationships, and helpers
Contracts: PayableProduct, BillableCustomer interfaces for external module integration
Events: ShopEvents using CMS hooks system (shop_order_completed, shop_subscription_*, etc.)
StripeService: full Stripe API wrapper (customers, products, checkout sessions, payment intents, subscriptions, refunds, webhooks, billing portal)
CheckoutService: cart management (session-based), order creation, coupon application, tax calculation, order completion flow
Superadmin controllers: ProductController (CRUD), OrderController, SubscriptionController, CouponController, SettingsController
Tenant controllers: ShopController (catalog), CartController (cart+checkout), CustomerController (account area), WebhookController (Stripe), ShopAdminController (tenant product/order management)

26 Blade views: superadmin CRUD (products, orders, subscriptions, coupons, settings), tenant frontend (catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, success/cancel, customer dashboard/orders/subscriptions), tenant admin (products, orders, settings)
Admin menu: Tienda > Productos, Pedidos, Suscripciones, Cupones, Configuración
Stripe webhook handler: checkout.session.completed, payment_intent.succeeded, invoice.paid, invoice.payment_failed, customer.subscription.updated/deleted
All modals use SweetAlert2 (no Bootstrap modals)
